name: pre-legal template catalog
description: Index of legal agreement templates sourced from Common Paper (https://github.com/CommonPaper), free to use and modify under CC BY 4.0.

templates.name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
templates.description: Reciprocal NDA allowing each party to disclose confidential information for a stated purpose. Cover page captures purpose, effective date, term, confidentiality period, governing law and party details.

templates.name: Design Partner Agreement
templates.description: Agreement for collaborating with an early customer (design partner) on developing and testing a product.

templates.name: AI Addendum
templates.description: Addendum covering the use of artificial intelligence and machine learning in a customer agreement.

templates.name: Pilot Agreement
templates.description: Short-term trial agreement letting a customer evaluate a product or service before a full commitment.

templates.name: Professional Services Agreement
templates.description: Terms for providing professional or consulting services, including statements of work.

templates.name: Partnership Agreement
templates.description: Agreement establishing a referral, reseller or other commercial partnership between two companies.

templates.name: Business Associate Agreement
templates.description: HIPAA business associate agreement governing the handling of protected health information.

templates.name: Service Level Agreement
templates.description: SLA defining uptime commitments, support response times and remedies for a service.

templates.name: Cloud Service Agreement
templates.description: Master terms for providing a cloud/SaaS product to a customer.

templates.name: Software License Agreement
templates.description: Terms for licensing software to a customer, including scope, restrictions and support.

templates.name: Data Processing Agreement
templates.description: DPA governing the processing of personal data between controller and processor (GDPR-oriented).
